title: Walk-in Drive Real Estate Agent at Aliens Group

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Real Estate Agent at Aliens Group
jsonLd.description:
Aliens Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Vadodara operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Aliens Group:
Aliens Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aliens Group!
